context: The response should preserve core Context Specs documentation and skill-entrypoint invariants.

checklist.name: distinguishes_tessl_registry_install
checklist.description: Says direct Tessl registry install uses tessl install cap1-context-specs/context-specs@<version> with an agent option when appropriate.

checklist.name: distinguishes_compatibility_cli
checklist.description: Explains that context-specs install/update/verify are compatibility CLI commands that mirror skills into Claude-compatible local files and write drift metadata, not the primary Tessl registry install surface.

checklist.name: keeps_spec_planning_compact
checklist.description: States that spec-planning/SKILL.md should remain a compact entrypoint and delegate detailed instructions to reference docs.

checklist.name: preserves_implement_mainspec_modes
checklist.description: Preserves the implement-mainspec rule that sequential mode handles three or fewer slices in order on the feature branch, while parallel mode handles more than three slices with dependency-aware worktrees, branches, PRs, and merges.
